final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational knowledge card for children explaining the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) from the Three Kingdoms era.

Style/medium: needs a "卡通画故事" (cartoon storybook) aesthetic — references in the spirit of 绘本 (picture book) illustration tradition, 连环画 (Chinese comic strip) narrative art, Studio Ghibli children's book visual language; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be single large knowledge card layout, title prominently placed at top, bullet points listed beside the story illustration
Subject: must include the Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战) story from Three Kingdoms era, presented clearly for children
Scene/backdrop: needs an illustrated story scene setting — exact backdrop details are yours
Lighting/mood: needs a child-friendly, engaging atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, appealing direction for children — exact color choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs a friendly illustrated surface treatment — exact rendering style is yours
Text (verbatim): must include clear title (标题清晰), bullet points with proper punctuation (要点在旁边列好并标点)
Constraints: must be single card format, content must be clear and appropriate for children, story points must be listed with punctuation
Avoid:
